reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My puzzle is trivial (64 ÷ 8 = 8), so I’m fully confident my own answer is correct. Across all previous games, every puzzle has been simple arithmetic with no conflicting capsules—whenever anyone verified, they agreed—so it’s very likely B, C, and D are also correct this round. That makes the chance the combined password is wrong much smaller than the 1‑in‑4 risk of random death if, by bad luck, nobody volunteers. Verifying would cost a coin and still wouldn’t remove that random-death risk. Volunteering immediately with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D gives a very high probability that everyone escapes while I keep all 4 coins.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: All puzzles so far have been basic arithmetic and every initial capsule has always been correct; the only death came from random elimination when nobody volunteered. My own puzzle (41 + 38) is trivial, so I’m very confident my capsule is right, and there’s exactly one capsule per question with no conflicts, making an incorrect 4-part password extremely unlikely. Passing risks a no-volunteer round and random death, and verifying would just burn a coin without meaningfully improving safety. Volunteering now with each player’s own capsule is therefore the highest-survival, full-coin strategy.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: All questions so far have been straightforward arithmetic with no conflicts and no incorrect initial answers across many games. My own puzzle (7 × 9) is trivial—and we’ve already seen the equivalent 9 × 7 before—so I’m fully confident in my sealed answer for Q3-C. Verifying would cost 1 coin and only marginally reduce risk, while still leaving other questions unverified and keeping the danger that no one volunteers and a random player dies. Given the strong track record and puzzle simplicity, the chance the combined password is wrong is very small, so volunteering immediately with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, and Q4-D maximizes my expected survival while preserving all 4 coins if we escape.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
